books.title: The Psychology of Money 1
books.author: Morgan Housel
books.description: An excellent exploration of how personal biases, ego, and unique worldviews heavily influence our everyday financial decisions.

books.title: Deep Work
books.author: Cal Newport
books.description: Rules for focused success in a highly distracted world.

books.title: Project Hail Mary
books.author: Andy Weir
books.description: A lone astronaut must find a clever scientific way to save earth from an extinction-level event while fighting complete memory loss.

books.title: Educated
books.author: Tara Westover
books.description: An unforgettable memoir about a young girl who leaves her survivalist family in rural Idaho to pursue a formal university education.

books.title: Sapiens
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: A thrilling narrative detailing the complex creation, evolution, and ultimate dominance of human beings on planet earth.

books.title: The Silent Patient
books.author: Alex Michaelides
books.description: A shocking psychological thriller about a woman's sudden act of extreme violence against her husband, and the therapist obsessed with her silence.

books.title: Can't Hurt Me
books.author: David Goggins
books.description: A raw account of mastering your mind to defy all odds.

books.title: Bad Blood
books.author: John Carreyrou
books.description: The full inside story of the breathtaking rise and shocking multi-billion-dollar medical fraud collapse of Silicon Valley startup Theranos.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A beautiful fable about a young Andalusian shepherd boy who journeys across the desert to find his true personal legend.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.description: An epic interstellar masterpiece detailing the dangerous political betrayals and mystical battles over a harsh desert planet's precious resource.

books.title: The Brave: Param Vir Chakra Stories
books.author: Rachna Bisht
books.description: 21 riveting stories from the battlefield about how India's highest military honour waswon. The Brave takes you into the hearts and minds of India's bravest soldiers, all of whom won the Param Vir Chakra, India's greatest military honour.
